title: Board Owner Permission Section (along side to Member/Guest)
excerpt:
Description
I am seeing a lack of some hierarchy between the admin, member and guest. I would love to be able to give a board owner permissions that are unique and don’t require travelling up and down between the Account…

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am seeing a lack of some hierarchy between the admin, member and guest. I would love to be able to give a board owner permissions that are unique and don’t require travelling up and down between the Account, Workspace and Board Permissions.

What are you trying to achieve

To have another layer of roles above Member and below Admin in the board point of view. Thanks!
